visual_description: A man in a suit is seen in close-up, his face partially obscured by motion blur. Outside, police officers stand near a cordoned-off area with vehicles, including a police van, parked along a street lined with buildings and an overpass. People are gathered behind police tape, some looking toward the scene, while others appear to be moving or conversing.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a steady pace, accompanied by a noticeable sigh at the beginning.
